scripts.test: cd .. && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/worker tests/integration/worker
scripts.db:local:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env dev --local --persist-to=.wrangler/state/dev
scripts.db:local:migrate:e2e: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env e2e --local --persist-to=.wrangler/state/e2e
scripts.db:remote:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env dev --remote
scripts.db:remote:migrate:e2e: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env e2e --remote
